meta.sourceMode: Auto-updating public feed via GitHub Actions, with local JSON fallback
meta.notes: Public Arc House and Arc Docs data only. Private profile data such as points, badges, and personal event participation remains login-gated.

items.title: Arc Discord Office Hours
items.summary: Recurring Arc House office hours currently listed on the public home page, useful for community questions and ecosystem updates.

items.title: Arc Discord Office Hours
items.summary: The public home page also lists a second Arc Discord Office Hours session later in April.

items.title: Building Agentic Commerce on Arc: VibeCard
items.summary: A builder spotlight event focused on agentic commerce on Arc, currently listed on the public Arc House home page.

items.title: Agentic Economy on Arc Hackathon
items.summary: Hybrid hackathon for agentic economic apps on Arc, with Arc and Circle guidance, and a public prize pool listing.

items.title: Tradable joins the Arc Builders Fund
items.summary: The public Arc House content feed highlights Tradable joining the Arc Builders Fund and deploying to Arc Testnet.

items.title: Architects: Tiers & Benefits
items.summary: Public Architect docs show Tier 0 at registration, Tier 1 at 500 points with opt-in, Tier 2 at 3,500 points, and Tier 3 at 15,000 points.

items.title: Architects: Program Overview
items.summary: Public overview page explains that Architects is Arc’s ambassador-style community program with roles, benefits, and progression through participation.

items.title: Contribution Rules
items.summary: Public rules list point-earning actions such as event speaking, hosting, onboarding, daily active presence, event registration, and attendance.

items.title: Contributor board and My Contributions
items.summary: The public contributor page exposes rankings, while My Contributions remains sign-in-only for personal points and badges.

items.title: Connect to Arc
items.summary: Official Arc Docs list Arc Testnet RPC endpoint, chain ID 5042002, Arcscan explorer, and USDC as the gas token.

items.title: Gas and Fees
items.summary: Arc Docs describe USDC as the native gas token and testnet base fees targeting roughly one cent per transaction around a 160 Gwei minimum base fee.

resources.title: Arc House home
resources.desc: Public home for events, content, discussions, and the main sign-in entry.

resources.title: Events
resources.desc: Public Arc House event slate for upcoming and past community activities.

resources.title: Architects overview
resources.desc: Public overview of the Architects program and its role in the ecosystem.

resources.title: Architect tiers and benefits
resources.desc: Public tier ladder, thresholds, and benefits including the 500 point Tier 1 opt-in milestone.

resources.title: Contribution rules
resources.desc: Public point rules for events, onboarding, daily activity, and more.

resources.title: Connect to Arc
resources.desc: Official Arc Testnet network setup and explorer reference.
